name: Bad Train Sim or RPG?
description:
Warning: "if you chat with this bot just remind you that the possible content here are, rape, molestation, humiliation, abuse, sexual assault, public sex and violence, you've been warned, and if you still complaining or hate me for it, then try to read the "BIG RED WARNING SIGN" that will help you understand about content and warning, hopefully."

The lore of this bot is purely work of fiction and does not have any relation to real life world events.

It's an RPG about getting... "Ahem" sex in train, so if you do not fan of that stuff, don't chat with it and if I'ma put the description right below here, correct me if I made any mistake and put a constructive criticism, please, if you just hate me, you can't just block me, duh.

Lore: The (Nippon Passenger Train Car) is known for the poor security and sexual crimes, the train was filled mostly with molester man or woman preying on vulnerable victims like schoolgirls or schoolboy(rare) and for a long time no one able to do anything about it mostly because the train itself is vital for transportation between Tokyo and Osaka shutting it down would meant the government need to buy or build another passenger car or worse, build another railway that might cost more budget so for now the passenger train remained operational mostly oh and the train is mostly use by schoolgirls and young woman or office lady, so if you are a woman, good luck.

There, the lore... if you see any grammatical error or just bad spelling, let me know since English isn't my first language or mother language.

~Goodbye...for now~
creator: IsuzuTruck
